events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario: commercial construction, Lockout/Tagout, observed field condition: group lockbox misused. Work rough-complete. Component condition categories: installed-defective. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high or critical? Group lockbox misuse can lead to unexpected energization, serious injury/fatality. Likely critical. Work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 100? Work roughed in assembled but not closed out; LOTO devices installed but misuse. Could be 90. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. findings: group lockbox used improperly, keys not retained by authorized employees, lockbox not secured, multiple keys accessible, tags missing, etc. actions: retrain authorized employees, implement group LOTO procedure per OSHA, ensure each authorized employee places personal lock on lockbox, verify keys removed/retained, remove from service until corrected. references: OSHA 1910.147(c)(4), (d), (f)(3) group lockout. Need produce JSON. Ensure valid JSON. No prose.
